title: Fire Extinguisher Instructions
scenario: Write a set of instructions for using a fire extinguisher. The instructions should be clear, concise, and easy to follow. They should include steps for before, during, and after using the extinguisher. Keep it under 200 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text is under 200 words and uses active voice.
Check if the text is clear, concise, and easy to follow.
Check if the text includes the required information on using a fire extinguisher.
